title: You are extracting a typed research intelligence graph for LLM-Wiki.
body_text: You are extracting a typed research intelligence graph for LLM-Wiki. Return ONLY one valid JSON object. No markdown fences, no commentary. Schema: { "nodes": [ {"key": "local-reference", "name": "display name", "type": "one allowed node type", "aliases": [], "description": "", "metadata": {}} ], "edges": [ {"source": "node key or name", "target": "node key or name", "type": "one allowed edge type", "evidence": "exact source sentence/span", "metadata": {}} ] } Allowed node types: ["Algorithm", "ApproachFamily", "ArchitecturePattern", "Benchmark", "Capability", "CausalClaim", "Claim", "ComparisonClaim", "Concept", "ContributionClaim", "Dataset", "EvaluationProtocol", "EvidenceSpan", "InferenceStrategy", "LimitationClaim", "MathematicalConcept", "MethodologicalConcept", "Metric", "Model", "ObjectiveFunction", "OpenQuestion", "Organization", "Paper", "PerformanceClaim", "Person", "ProblemArea", "Project", "Repository", "ResearchField", "ResearchTopic", "Result", "SourceDocument", "Task", "TechnicalTerm", "TrainingParadigm", "Trend"] Allowed edge types: ["achieves_score", "addresses", "attributes_improvement_to", "authored_by", "belongs_to_approach_family", "compares_against", "contradi

turns.text:
You are extracting a typed research intelligence graph for LLM-Wiki.

Return ONLY one valid JSON object. No markdown fences, no commentary.

Schema:
{
  "nodes": [
    {"key": "local-reference", "name": "display name", "type": "one allowed node type", "aliases": [], "description": "", "metadata": {}}
  ],
  "edges": [
    {"source": "node key or name", "target": "node key or name", "type": "one allowed edge type", "evidence": "exact source sentence/span", "metadata": {}}
  ]
}

Allowed node types:
["Algorithm", "ApproachFamily", "ArchitecturePattern", "Benchmark", "Capability", "CausalClaim", "Claim", "ComparisonClaim", "Concept", "ContributionClaim", "Dataset", "EvaluationProtocol", "EvidenceSpan", "InferenceStrategy", "LimitationClaim", "MathematicalConcept", "MethodologicalConcept", "Metric", "Model", "ObjectiveFunction", "OpenQuestion", "Organization", "Paper", "PerformanceClaim", "Person", "ProblemArea", "Project", "Repository", "ResearchField", "ResearchTopic", "Result", "SourceDocument", "Task", "TechnicalTerm", "TrainingParadigm", "Trend"]

Allowed edge types:
["achieves_score", "addresses", "attributes_improvement_to", "authored_by", "belongs_to_approach_family", "compares_against", "contradicts_claim", "criticizes", "declining_in", "derived_from", "emerged_after", "evaluated_on", "evidenced_by", "extends", "has_limitation", "implemented_in", "improves_on", "introduces", "is_a", "mentioned_in", "optimizes_for", "part_of", "released_by", "reports_result", "rising_in", "shares_concept_with", "subfield_of", "supports_claim", "uses", "uses_dataset", "uses_metric"]

Forbidden node/edge labels: Entity, software, technique, domain, topic, technology, feature, related_to.
Map them to controlled research types instead.

Extraction policy:
- Include exactly one source artifact node for this document when possible.
- Source kind: Paper
- Preferred source title: LLM Wiki Smoke Paper
- Extract reusable research concepts, methods, math concepts, datasets, benchmarks, metrics, tasks, approach families, claims, and evidence spans.
- Every factual claim node should connect to an EvidenceSpan via evidenced_by.
- Use exact source text as evidence where possible.
- Do not invent claims that are not supported by the document.

Source path: output/claude_cli_smoke_note.md
